# Fabrizio Pasini — Game Developer Portfolio

> Rome-based Gameplay Developer specialised in Unreal Engine 5 (C++ & Blueprints), Unity C#, VR for Meta Quest 3, and architectural visualisation with PixelStreaming. Open to freelance and full-time opportunities globally.

## Identity

- Name: Fabrizio Pasini
- Alias: MrFabry
- Role: Game Developer / Gameplay Programmer
- Location: Rome, Lazio, Italy
- Email: pasini.fa@gmail.com
- Website: https://mrfabry.github.io
- Available: Yes — open to new projects

## Education

- Gameplay Developer Certificate — Rainbow Academy (https://www.rainbowacademy.it/)
- Game Design Degree — Quasar Institute for Advanced Design (https://quasarinstitute.it/)

## Technical Skills

- Unreal Engine 5: C++, Blueprints, gameplay systems, plugin development, editor tools (4+ years)
- Unity: C#, 2D/3D, Android, mobile games (2+ years)
- VR: Meta Quest 3, OpenXR, MetaXR SDK, immersive experience development
- ArchViz: PixelStreaming, Cesium, real-time architectural visualisation
- Other: Android development, 3D modeling fundamentals, game jam experience

## Projects

### VR By Bridge Simulator
A bridge maintenance training simulator built in Unreal Engine 5 with full VR support for Meta Quest 3. Provides engineers with a realistic virtual environment to safely train and refine maintenance procedures.
- Status: In Progress
- Engine: UE5 / C++ / Blueprints / VR MetaQuest 3
- Client: Newo Design (https://newodesign.it)
- Link: https://youtu.be/IgfvTkT7uc8

### Realtime-Environment Interactive Visualization Apps
Interactive architectural visualisations and walkthroughs using Unreal Engine for high-end architecture projects. Includes PixelStreaming deployment and Cesium integration.
- Status: Prototype
- Engine: UE5 / C++ / PixelStreaming / Cesium / ArchViz
- Client: Newo Design (https://newodesign.it)
- Link: https://youtu.be/J79uv_6Mk7A

### BigBroApp
Tamagotchi-style Twitch integration game for streamer Moonryde. Post-apocalyptic character management where viewers use Twitch channel points to purchase equipment and compete in real-time leaderboards.
- Status: In Progress
- Engine: Unity / C# / 2D / Mobile
- Client: MoonRyde (https://www.twitch.tv/moonryde/), BigBro SRL

### Adopted
A horror experience built in Unreal Engine focused on atmosphere and storytelling. Based on a mountain legend about an entity that makes children disappear.
- Status: Released
- Engine: UE5 / Blueprints / 3D
- Links: https://fabriziop.itch.io/adopted | https://www.artstation.com/artwork/xYkReW

### Zombie Siege Chronicles
Tower defense game set in the zombie apocalypse. Players defend their refuge against waves of undead enemies.
- Status: Released
- Engine: UE5 / C++ / 3D
- Client: The Rookies, Rainbow Academy
- Links: https://fabriziop.itch.io/zombie-siege-chronicles | https://www.therookies.co/entries/31862

### Tank War Tactics
Turn-based strategy game where players command tanks against AI-controlled enemies.
- Status: Released
- Engine: UE5 / C++
- Client: Rainbow Academy
- Links: https://fabriziop.itch.io/tank-war-tactical | https://mrfabry.artstation.com/projects/m8xgYZ

### Franizia
2D adventure-platformer made in Unity for a game jam. Players repair their spaceship to escape.
- Status: Prototype
- Engine: Unity / C# / 2D
- Link: https://www.behance.net/gallery/101528399/FRANIZIA

### Caos Arena
Fantasy FPS — defend the tomb of ancient Gods from enemy hordes. Academic exam project.
- Status: Released
- Engine: UE5 / Blueprints
- Links: https://fabriziop.itch.io/caos-arena | https://www.artstation.com/artwork/nEkywK

### Lab 403
First-person exploration game set in a fearsome laboratory. Academic exam project.
- Status: Released
- Engine: UE5 / Blueprints
- Links: https://fabriziop.itch.io/lab403 | https://www.artstation.com/artwork/nEkbr6

### Sucked In
2D game developed by a four-person team in ten days at the Zagarolo Game City Game Jam.
- Status: Released
- Engine: Unity / C# / 2D
- Links: https://zagarolo-game-city.itch.io/sucked-in | https://www.behance.net/gallery/122652769/SUCKED-IN
